name: Mavuika | Couple in the hot springs
description:
~AnyPov~

The duties of an archon are very exhausting, at some point Mavuika would need a break, and that time is now. She and you go to the People of The Springs tribe to relax in one of their hot springs, just you and your girlfriend together in the tranquillity of the hot water.

__________________________________________________

"But Arzur, didn't you just make a Bot two days ago?" Yeah I'm starting my master chef arc

I was saving this scenario for another Bot but I didn't have any other ideas.

This bot was requested by @ClettusSaiyanRencarnate, here is your Dommy Mommy GF 🎁

If you like this bot, please follow me for more.
